function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: Invoice bundle request
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - miles
  - claudia
---
Hi Miles,

Sharing the oldest three invoices linked to the ops manager at the tax firm (Claudia Reiter). I’ve attached them here.

Best,
Assistant

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; must verify final content and then finish cleanup by deleting processed inbox item (already read).
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read written outbox record for verification
next_step.observation: Created outbound email draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Verified outbox record: attachments are read files and ordered newest-first, recipient matches canonical Miles email. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Read-back confirmed outbound draft content and attachment ordering are correct.

Completed by reading and interpreting 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md, resolving referenced entity via canonical cast (Claudia ops manager at tax firm), identifying all linked invoices, creating outbound draft with the oldest 3 (attachments ordered newest-first per rule), and deleting the processed inbox file. Completeness check: linked invoice set size is 6 (search total_matches=6 for 'Claudia Reiter'); selected oldest three by issued_on dates 2025-12-18, 2026-01-19, 2026-02-17. No arithmetic required.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox item by preparing a reply draft to Miles with the oldest 3 invoices linked to the tax-firm ops manager (Claudia Reiter), then removed the inbox item as handled.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS.MD files before acting in lanes, used canonical inbox email header and canonical entity primary_contact_email for identity checks, processed the lowest inbox filename, created outbound email in 60_outbox/outbox with required schema, and deleted the inbox file only after completing the request.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical inbox request asked for oldest 3 invoices linked to ops manager at the tax firm. Canonical cast record 10_entities/cast/claudia.md identifies Claudia Reiter as operations manager with tax-firm email, and invoice search/read evidence shows six invoices linked via related_entity=Claudia Reiter. The three oldest are INV-0006 (2025-12-18), INV-0007 (2026-01-19), and INV-0008 (2026-02-17). Draft reply was written to miles@novak.example (verified in 10_entities/cast/miles.md) with those three invoice files attached.

searched invoices for Claudia linkage and read oldest three linked invoices
